title: Children’s Social Care Prevention Grant Determination 2025 to 2026
body: "This is the grant determination for the Children’s Social Care Prevention Grant for 2025 to 2026. This grant is for direct investment in additional prevention activity for children and families through the implementation of Family Help and Child Protection reforms. It will also fund local authorities to deliver against the planned new legislative duty to offer Family Group Decision Making (FGDM) meetings to all families at the pre-proceedings stage. This grant should be used alongside the Children and Families Grant, which will enable continuation of existing prevention services. "
